title: Skyblock Recipes
description: This datapack aims to allow most blocks in the game to be accessible in a classic skyblock setting.
body:
# Skyblock Recipes:

The creation of this datapack started with a gripe I had with the downsides of skyblock along with my love for the gamemode.

So, this project aims to make nearly all blocks and items accessibly in a classic skyblock world environment, no fancy extra islands needed! Just drop this datapack in your skyblock world, and it should hopefully work as intended.

This datapack is still in somewhat early stages of development, as there are a LOT of blocks in Minecraft, and on top of that I have to figure out a fitting recipe for each. Hopefully this won't take too long, but suggestions on the tweaking of recipes are highly valuable to making the overall process quicker.

Granted, this datapack also tends to stray away from the core idea of skyblock, which is the idea of having limited resources. However, from the amount of testing I've been able to do, it seems to work better with friends.

## Current List of Features:
- 128 unique recipes
- Recipes for all sapling types
- Recipes for all stone types
- Recipes for all ore types
- Recipes for all crop types & extra dye recipes (+ most flower types)
- Recipes for corals
- Extra usage for the blast furnace and stonecutter
- Other miscellaneous additions
